title: Literal Bedrock Experience
description: Welcome to Minecraft Bedrock Edition™! Can you still beat the game?
body:
# Literal Bedrock Experience

Welcome to Minecraft Bedrock Edition™. Yeah, bedrock edition, literally. Everything is now visually bedrock.

![Screenshot](https://github.com/rlc-longterm-survival/literal-bedrock-experience/blob/master/screenshot.png?raw=true)

As you see, water and foliage still have colors. If you don't want those colors, you can download the colorless version. However it requires [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/) or [Colormatic](https://modrinth.com/mod/colormatic).

## Why did you make it

This started as a survival challenge where all textures become bedrock. We want to see if each member can still beat the game and how long we'd take.

## Generating your own one

You can find the code for generating the pack [here](https://github.com/rlc-longterm-survival/literal-bedrock-experience). You may use it to generate your own customized or modded Literal Bedrock Experience™ pack.

## Disclaimer

Playing with this resource pack for too long may result in some sort of nausea. Be careful.

The copyright of the bedrock texture and original assets belong to Mojang Studios.
